understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle by positioning every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+) simultaneously to win each level and complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE actions shift the selected piece (P), potentially pushing adjacent blocks (B); walls (#) block movement variably. CLICK on a selectable's pixel coordinates [x,y] switches selection (S becomes P). All goals must be occupied together for WIN; coordinates are pixel/grid-based with 3px/cell.
